full_description: Focus Timer is a productivity app that helps users stay focused and on track. It uses the Pomodoro Technique to boost concentration and efficiency. This technique involves working in focused, 25-minute increments, followed by a 5-minute break. After four cycles, a longer break of 15-30 minutes is taken. This cycle of work and break helps to reduce distractions, increase motivation, and maintain a sustainable work pace. With Focus Timer, you can customize the length of your work sessions and breaks to fit your needs, as well as track your progress and stay motivated with statistics and rewards. Whether you're a student, freelancer, or employee, Focus Timer can help you stay on track and achieve your goals.
